headline: AI Chip Demand Surges, Fed Signals Hawkish Shift, Iran Deal Creates Oil Volatility
summary: AI chip sector sees robust demand, with Taiwan memory designers projecting 245% revenue growth. The new Fed Chair signals a potentially hawkish stance, while conflicting reports on the US-Iran deal create oil market volatility.

bullets.lead: ARM stock sees significant price target increases.
bullets.body: Bernstein raised its price target on ARM stock by nearly 70%, reflecting strong market confidence in the semiconductor design firm.

sources.title: Why Bernstein Just Raised Its Price Target on Arm Stock by Nearly 70%

bullets.lead: US raises alarm over EUV technology in China.
bullets.body: Concerns are mounting in the US regarding the potential presence of EUV machines in China, putting ASML on the defensive amidst efforts to control advanced chip technology exports.

sources.title: US raises alarm over possible EUV machine in China, putting ASML on the defensive

bullets.lead: FPGA firm Efinix expands edge AI business.
bullets.body: Efinix is lining up TSMC Japan fab for its growing edge AI business, indicating continued expansion in specialized AI hardware manufacturing.

sources.title: FPGA firm Efinix lines up TSMC Japan fab as edge AI business grows

bullets.lead: Taiwan memory chip designers project substantial revenue growth.
bullets.body: Taiwan's memory chip designers anticipate a 245% revenue jump driven by surging AI storage demand, signaling a strong market supercycle.

sources.title: Taiwan memory chip designers set for 245% revenue jump on AI storage demand

bullets.lead: SK Hynix discusses HBM supply and US investment.
bullets.body: SK Hynix reportedly held talks in the U.S. regarding HBM supply and potential local investment plans, highlighting the critical role of HBM in AI infrastructure.

sources.title: SK Hynix reportedly held U.S. talks on HBM supply and local investment plans

bullets.lead: High memory costs impact smartphone market estimates.
bullets.body: Goldman Sachs has trimmed global smartphone market estimates, citing the impact of high memory costs on the industry's profitability.

sources.title: Goldman Sachs trims global smartphone market estimates on high memory costs

bullets.lead: Kevin Warsh is set to reshape the Federal Reserve.
bullets.body: The new Fed Chair, Kevin Warsh, is expected to implement significant changes, with markets anticipating a more hawkish stance and a review of Fed operations.

sources.title: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
Warsh to review how Fed works after holding US interest rates at first meeting

bullets.lead: Fed's preferred inflation gauge shows acceleration.
bullets.body: The Fed's favorite inflation gauge is projected to indicate faster inflation, despite some initial relief in the overall outlook.

sources.title: Fed’s Favorite Gauge Is Seen Showing Faster Inflation
The Fed's Latest Inflation Outlook Offers Wall Street Its First Relief in Months

bullets.lead: Warsh may withhold the 'dot plot' from outlook.
bullets.body: Fed Chair Warsh is expected to potentially withhold the 'dot' from the central bank's interest rate outlook, altering communication with markets.

sources.title: Fed Chair Warsh expected to withhold 'dot' from central bank's interest rate outlook

bullets.lead: Trump's Iran deal draws mixed international reactions.
bullets.body: The US-Iran deal is hailed by some but criticized by others, with concerns that conflict continues to cast a long shadow over the global economy.

sources.title: Sizing Up Trump’s Iran Deal
Trump hails Iran deal but conflict continues to cast long shadow over global economy
Rahm Emanuel says Trump ‘got schooled’ by Iran in bad ceasefire deal

bullets.lead: China's 'red supply chain' is a growing focus.
bullets.body: Discussions around China's 'red supply chain' highlight ongoing geopolitical shifts in global manufacturing and technology dependencies.

sources.title: [한우덕의 중국 읽기] 홍색 공급망

bullets.lead: India seeks tariff advantages over rivals.
bullets.body: India is pursuing a US tariff edge over competitors before enacting a new trade pact, indicating strategic trade negotiations.

sources.title: India Seeks US Tariff Edge Over Rivals Before Enacting Trade Pact

bullets.lead: Trump's Iran deal faces scrutiny and criticism.
bullets.body: The Iran deal is seen by some as a potential failure, with critics suggesting Trump was 'schooled' by Iran and that his legacy could be tied to Tehran's actions.

sources.title: Sizing Up Trump’s Iran Deal
Trump hails Iran deal but conflict continues to cast long shadow over global economy
Rahm Emanuel says Trump ‘got schooled’ by Iran in bad ceasefire deal

bullets.lead: Anthropic labeled a national security threat by Trump.
bullets.body: Former President Trump has stated that Anthropic poses a national security threat, indicating potential future policy implications for AI companies.

sources.title: Exclusive: Trump tells "The Axios Show" that Anthropic was a national security threat

bullets.lead: EU fast-tracks US tariff deal with Trump safeguards.
bullets.body: The EU is expediting a US tariff deal and implementing three Trump safeguards, reflecting ongoing adjustments to transatlantic trade relations.

sources.title: EU fast-tracks US tariff deal, adds three Trump safeguards

bullets.lead: Meta CEO projects superintelligence for all.
bullets.body: Meta's CEO has promised the advent of superintelligence, believing it will become universally accessible, aligning with broader industry discussions on AGI.

sources.title: Meta’s CEO Just Promised Superintelligence. He Thinks Everyone Will Have It

bullets.lead: Google DeepMind outlines paths to advanced AI.
bullets.body: Google DeepMind has mapped four distinct paths from Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) to Artificial Superintelligence (ASI), detailing the future trajectory of AI development.

sources.title: Google DeepMind maps four paths from AGI to ASI

bullets.lead: Amazon's AI chip efforts gain advantage.
bullets.body: Amazon is reportedly gaining an advantage in AI chip development, with its internal efforts and new competitors like OpenClaw emerging.

sources.title: Why Google Star AI Researcher Joined OpenAI, New OpenClaw Competitor, Amazon’s AI Chip Advantage

watchlist.name: Fed
watchlist.note: New Chair Warsh's first meeting and communication style on inflation and rates will be key.

sources.title: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
Warsh to review how Fed works after holding US interest rates at first meeting

watchlist.name: ASML
watchlist.note: Under pressure regarding US concerns over EUV technology access in China.

sources.title: US raises alarm over possible EUV machine in China, putting ASML on the defensive

watchlist.name: SK Hynix
watchlist.note: HBM supply discussions and potential US investment plans signal future capacity and market share.

sources.title: SK Hynix reportedly held U.S. talks on HBM supply and local investment plans

watchlist.name: Anthropic
watchlist.note: Labeled a national security threat by Trump, indicating potential future policy scrutiny for AI firms.

sources.title: Exclusive: Trump tells "The Axios Show" that Anthropic was a national security threat

watchlist.name: Oil Prices
watchlist.note: Continued volatility expected due to conflicting reports and interpretations of the US-Iran deal.

sources.title: Oil Glut Bets Are Back in Play as Crude Sinks After US-Iran Deal
Iran's Tasnim news agency says Hormuz will not reopen until Lebanon ceasefire holds, oil waivers issued
Oil Prices Rise as U.S.-Iran Deal Faces Tests
Deal or no deal, oil prices will stay volatile for months
